changes.check: lab_range_only schema — required fields (mandatory-fresh source read)
changes.evidence: backend/core/analytics/scoring_policy_registry.py:77-85 and backend/core/scoring/rules.py:146-160. Required fields: (1) scoring_type: 'lab_range_only'; (2) unit: non-empty string — ValueError if empty (registry:79-80, rules:147-148); (3) weight: numeric (registry:72-73). Optional: age_adjustment (bool), sex_adjustment (bool). No other fields required.

changes.check: lab_range_only schema — forbidden fields (mandatory-fresh source read)
changes.evidence: backend/core/analytics/scoring_policy_registry.py:81-84: if policy.get('bands') is not None raises ValueError('lab_range_only biomarker must not declare bands: {id}'). backend/core/scoring/rules.py:149-151: same guard in _build_biomarker_rule. No hardcoded production bands permitted for these markers under any circumstances.

changes.check: lab_range_only runtime scoring behaviour — unscored sentinel (mandatory-fresh source read)
changes.evidence: backend/core/scoring/rules.py:453-455. When no lab reference range supplied: returns (0.0, ScoreRange.CRITICAL, UNSCORED_REASON) where UNSCORED_REASON = 'missing_lab_reference_range' from scoring_policy.yaml:17. Lab-provided range is sole authority — no SSOT/global range fallback for lab-provided biomarkers.

changes.check: System biomarker registration constraint — dual-entry requirement
changes.evidence: backend/core/analytics/scoring_policy_registry.py:100-108. Every biomarker in a system's biomarkers list must exist in the top-level biomarkers dict — ValueError if missing. Phase 1C must add BOTH: (1) system-level entries (hormonal.biomarkers: [tsh, free_t4, free_t3]) AND (2) biomarker-level entries in the top-level biomarkers section of scoring_policy.yaml.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:133 — STOP if TSH signal intelligence implied in card/assembler wiring/tests. :155-156 — STOP if FT3-low activated or TSH-suppressed companion gate loosened for FT3-high. :202 — STOP if lab_range_only schema ambiguous or requires inventing hardcoded ranges. :257 — STOP if Phase 1 validation fails before Phase 2. All critical boundary violations are hard STOP conditions.

lab_range_only scoring: lab range → position_in_range → score curve → score. Fully deterministic. FT3-high companion gate: hard boolean runtime condition (TSH-suppressed required). TSH lab-range scoring: stateless. No LLM input paths in scope. No non-deterministic elements introduced.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:98-116 — explicit prohibitions on frontend, Gemini, KB medical content, KB signal_library.yaml, research_brief.yaml, promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml, TSAT, iron/ferritin/CBC packages, ferritin-low packages, tooling files. Phase 2C (prompt:293-296) explicitly forbids frontend/report prose/Gemini wording.

changes.check: Output structure change — intentional and bounded
changes.evidence: New wave1_thyroid domain card is the declared product output of this sprint. Existing domain card structures are explicitly protected by regression tests requirement (prompt:288). Output structure change is the goal, not a side effect.

implementation_decision_points.required_action: Cursor must decide whether to change from 0.0. If 0.0 is retained, hormonal system contributes nothing to the overall composite score — thyroid markers score at system level but do not affect the overall report score. If this is not the intended behaviour, system_weight must be set to a non-zero value. Decision must be recorded in Phase 1A activation manifest before editing scoring_policy.yaml.

After adding thyroid markers, Cursor must decide whether min_biomarkers_required remains 0 (system fires with no thyroid markers present) or increases to 1 or more. Decision must be recorded in Phase 1A activation manifest before editing scoring_policy.yaml.

overall_verdict: HARDENED. No blockers. All five front-matter fields confirmed. All authority paths verified. lab_range_only schema fully verified from source (scoring_policy_registry.py:77-85, rules.py:146-160): required fields are scoring_type, unit (non-empty), weight; bands key is forbidden. Canonical thyroid marker keys confirmed: tsh, free_t4, free_t3. ADR launch positions freshly read (not inherited): FT3-high cleared with mandatory TSH-suppressed companion gate; FT3-low deferred; TSH signal intelligence not launch-active — lab-range-only scoring permitted via Phase 1D bounded-scope decision. Two implementation decision points (IDP-1: system_weight, IDP-2: min_biomarkers_required) surfaced that Cursor must resolve and document in Phase 1A manifest before writing scoring_policy.yaml — these are not hardening blockers. Phase 1 validation gate must pass before Phase 2 begins. Highest-risk boundary: TSH signal intelligence STOP condition — any test, assembler wiring, DTO field, or card copy implying kb52c clinical context is active must trigger an immediate STOP.
